---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# evolution

## sesolve

```{julia}
@doc sesolve
```

---
sesolve(
    H::Union{AbstractQuantumObject{Operator},Tuple},
    ψ0::QuantumObject{Ket},
    tlist::AbstractVector;
    alg::AbstractODEAlgorithm = Vern7(lazy=false),
    e_ops::Union{Nothing,AbstractVector,Tuple} = nothing,
    params = NullParameters(),
    progress_bar::Union{Val,Bool} = Val(true),
    inplace::Union{Val,Bool} = Val(true),
    kwargs...,
)

>alg: the alg to choose
>params: the params in H.
>, saveat = tlist,

```{julia}
# cases
using QuantumToolbox

H = 0.5 * sigmax()
ψ0 = basis(2, 0)
p = (T = 1,)
tlist = LinRange(0, p.T, 200)

sol = sesolve(H, ψ0, tlist; e_ops = [sigmaz(), sigmay()], params = p, saveat = tlist) # e_ops: 顺便记录哪些观测量期望值; use saveat to show all the states(t)

state0 = sol.states[1];
dot(state0[1], ψ0[1])
z = real(sol.expect[1, :]); # 对应的是你传进去的两个 e_ops
y = real(sol.expect[2, :]);
```

## mesolve

```{julia}
γ = 0.1

H = 0.5 * sigmax()
ψ0 = basis(2, 1)
c_ops = [sqrt(γ) * sigmam()] # 耗散项
tlist = LinRange(0, 20, 300)

sol = mesolve(H, ψ0, tlist, c_ops; e_ops = [sigmaz()])
```

### Liouvillian 和 Lindblad 工具

## mcsolve 

暂时用不到.
